landing.hero_desc: Simplify your business management with our intuitive platform. Articles, billing and financial reports all in one powerful, easy-to-use tool.
landing.s1_desc: Create and organise your product catalogue with ease. Manage prices, categories and variants for your items. Monitor stock levels in real time and get notified when replenishment is needed.
landing.s2_desc: Generate professional invoices in a few clicks. Manage your quotes, purchase orders and credit notes from a single interface. Send documents directly to clients and track every payment status.
landing.s3_desc: Access detailed reports on your sales, expenses and performance. Visualise your data on clear dashboards and export financial statements for your accounting.
landing.adv1_desc: Complete catalogue, prices and stock centralised in real time.
landing.adv2_desc: Manage multiple businesses from a single account.
landing.adv3_desc: Invoices, receipts and quotes generated automatically.
landing.adv4_desc: Dashboards and statements updated in real time.
landing.adv5_desc: Precise tracking of inflows, outflows and inventories.
landing.adv6_desc: A dedicated team to guide you every step of the way.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Everything you need to manage your business
services.s1_desc: Track your sales, stock and customers in real time.
services.s2_desc: Orders, tables, kitchen: all in one place.
services.s3_desc: Schedule and track your service deliveries with ease.
